AchievementInformationResponse.description: Enriched achievement with full awarded-to and awarded-by profile objects resolved inline

achievement_date.description: This is the posix time in ISO8601 format.

AchievementResponse.description: Achievement with awarded-to/by profile IDs and acceptance status

achievement_date.description: This is the posix time in ISO8601 format.

AchievementsPageResponse.description: Achievements explorer page: paginated items + total count + monthly accepted/pending stats

ActivityEventResponse.description: Single activity feed entry with event type, actor/target IDs, timestamp, and human-readable details

timestamp.description: This is the posix time in ISO8601 format.

ActivityEventType.description: Type of activity event: ProfileCreated, PromotionIssued, PromotionAccepted, PromotionSuperseded, AchievementAwarded, AchievementAccepted, MembershipGranted, MembershipAccepted

BJJBelt.description: BJJ belt rank. Values: White, Blue, Purple, Brown, Black, CoralWhite, CoralBlack, Red

DashboardPageResponse.description: Dashboard aggregate: totals, belt frequency, recent promotions, monthly trends, top organizations

GYAssetClass.description: Cardano native asset identifier in format: <56-char policy ID hex>.<asset name hex>

HomeExplorerHubPageResponse.description: Home page: recent promotions and latest practitioner profiles

date.description: This is the posix time in ISO8601 format.

LineageGraphData.description: Directed graph of belt lineage: nodes are profiles, edges are promotions (from awarder to recipient)

end_date.description: This is the posix time in ISO8601 format.

start_date.description: This is the posix time in ISO8601 format.

OrganizationDetailResponse.description: Complete organization profile page: profile, memberships, achievements issued/received, and member profile map

achievement_date.description: This is the posix time in ISO8601 format.

PendingActionsResponse.description: Pending actions inbox for a profile: unaccepted promotions, achievements, and membership intervals

PractitionerDetailResponse.description: Complete practitioner profile page: profile, achievements, memberships, promotions given/received, and related org/awarder maps

PractitionerExplorerPageResponse.description: Practitioner explorer page: practitioners with their memberships + org name lookup map

PractitionerProfileResponse.description: Practitioner profile with current and previous belt ranks

ProfileResponse.description: Basic profile summary with thumbnail URI derived from the on-chain image URI

ProfileType.description: Profile type: either Practitioner (individual) or Organization (academy/gym)

ProfilesPageResponse.description: Profiles explorer page: paginated items + total count + practitioner/organization frequency

PromotionInformationResponse.description: Enriched promotion with full achieved-by and awarded-by practitioner profiles resolved inline

achievement_date.description: This is the posix time in ISO8601 format.

PromotionState.description: Promotion lifecycle state: Pending (awaiting acceptance), Accepted (confirmed), or Superseded (replaced by a newer promotion)

PromotionsPageResponse.description: Promotions explorer page: paginated items + total count + belt frequency breakdown + monthly trend data

achievement_date.description: This is the posix time in ISO8601 format.

SearchResults.description: Unified search results grouped by category (practitioners, organizations, promotions, achievements)
